name: Dalgona Chocolate Iced Coffee
method: Add the instant coffee, sugar, and water to a small bowl. Using a hand blender stick or a milk frother, whip the ingredients until fluffy and thick.
Pour the milk and cocoa powder into a blender and blitz until combined and smooth.
Fill a tall glass with ice cubes. Add the milk mixture to the glass, and top with the whipped coffee mixture.
Dust with cocoa powder before serving.
